stemHtml: An Airborne Weather Radar (AWR) can be of assistance for navigation and position reference. The AWR can be used to determine the aircraft’s position by:

options.a: Using the mapping mode to obtain a magnetic bearing and distance from the aircraft to suitable echoes on the display.
options.b: Using the mapping mode to obtain a relative bearing and distance from the aircraft to suitable echoes on the display.
options.c: Selecting the mapping mode and choosing a large built-up area to obtain a relative bearing and distance from the aircraft.
options.d: Obtaining the magnetic bearing and distance from the aircraft.
